creator: oberman@es.net
text:
There is an error in
openoffice.org-2/work/OOH680_m17/libxslt/unxfbsdi.pro/misc/build/libxslt-1.1.16
at about line 21998. Delete one of the "=" to make the line:
- if test "1" == "1"
+ if test "1" = "1"
-- 
R. Kevin Oberman
Energy Sciences Network (ESnet)
Ernest Orlando Lawrence Berkeley National Laboratory (Berkeley Lab)
E-Mail: oberman@es.net                       Phone: +1 510-486-8634
